description: Ava Chin reflected on her family's American experience across five generations & the impact the 1882 Chinese Exclusion Act had on her family & community. She was interviewed by Yale University American studies & history professor Mary Lui. Sponsor: C-SPAN | Book TV

title: After Words Ava Chin, "Mott Street - A Chinese American Family's Story of Exclusion and Homecoming" : CSPAN2 : June 28, 2023 10:24pm-11:23pm EDT
